Affiliate disclosure

How affiliate links are used on Urban Harvest Lab.

Some articles may include affiliate links. If you click one of those links and make a purchase, Urban Harvest Lab may earn a commission at no additional cost to you.

Editorial independence

Recommendations should still fit the problem

Commissions do not change the underlying recommendation standard. Products should be suggested because they fit the use case, not because they exist in an affiliate catalog.

Disclosure placement

How readers are informed

Articles that may include affiliate links should contain a clear disclosure near the top of the page so the context is visible before the recommendation section.

Reader-first policy

Better to say “skip it” than force a product

If a simple setup, a cheaper tool, or no purchase at all is the better answer, that is the recommendation that should appear in the guide.

Questions

Need clarification?

Use the contact page if you want to ask how a product recommendation was framed or whether a link is commercial in nature.

Urban Harvest Lab

Calm, practical growing guidance for balconies, patios, and indoor shelves.

Science-based guides for urban gardening, hydroponics, grow lights, and small-space food growing.
